name: Waste Alchemists
author: S. A. Wagner, D. Jacobs, P. Eg

sections.description:
The Waste Alchemists Sales Tracker automatically detects and logs incoming orders that originated from a Waste Alchemists lead, giving you full visibility on your partnership, without any manual work. It is free for verified Waste Alchemists makers, ad-free and fully GDPR compliant.

Features

  • We automatically detect orders originating from a Waste Alchemists referral. You will see this in your order.
  • We log confirmed sales directly to our Waste Alchemists dashboard.
  • Cookies are placed and accepted through our platform. All set on our side!
  • Compatible with WooCommerce.
  • 100% GDPR compliant, no personal customer data is shared with third parties.
  • We only track data on which consent has been given to us.

Support

Need help? Reach out via info@wastealchemist.com
sections.installation:
Requirements

  • PHP 5.2.4 or greater determine still
  • WordPress 4.5 or greater determine still

Settings

After you have activated the Waste Alchemist Plugin, the plugin will allow you to enter a webhook that you have received from us. Make sure that you copy the exact link with no added spaces. We can test on our end whether the connection functions/is active.
sections.FAQ:
What does this plugin do?

The Waste Alchemists Sales Tracker automatically detects when an order in your WordPress store originates from a lead generated by Waste Alchemists. It logs these conversions and reports them back to your Waste Alchemists dashboard, so you always know exactly what your partnership is delivering.

Do I need a Waste Alchemists maker account to use this plugin?

No, we set everything up, yet this plugin is exclusively for verified makers on the Waste Alchemists platform.

Which e-commerce platforms are supported?

The plugin currently supports WooCommerce.

Will this plugin slow down my website?

No. The tracker runs lightweight in the background and only fires when an order is completed. It has no impact on your page load speed or customer experience.

Is my customers' personal data shared with Waste Alchemists?

No. The plugin only shares order confirmation and referral source data, never personal customer details unless agreed upon by the customer. It is fully GDPR compliant.

What counts as a Waste Alchemists lead?

A lead is counted when a customer visits your store via a Waste Alchemists referral link and completes a purchase on your website. The attribution can be found in the contract.

How do I install the plugin?

Download the plugin by uploading it as a ZIP file, upload it via Plugins → Add New in your WordPress admin, activate it, and enter your received URL in the settings. That's it.
